name: @stackra/queue
purpose: Client-side job queue — pluggable connectors (memory, localStorage, IndexedDB, BroadcastChannel, QStash), workers, decorators.
capabilities: Pluggable connectors: memory, localStorage, IndexedDB, BroadcastChannel, QStash
Worker + processor lifecycle with retry + backoff
React binding for monitoring queue depth
when_to_use: Running deferred or retriable work client-side (image resizing, offline sends, batched writes).
when_not_to_use: For scheduled recurring work use @stackra/scheduler; for reactive reads use @stackra/query.
